parsed_output.justification: James exhibits classic Tanner behavior by repeatedly begging to be voted out ('Vote for me', 'Kill James with me') and contradicting his own role claims multiple times (claiming to be the Witch, then the Troublemaker, then the Werewolf). Mitchell openly claims to be a Werewolf with high confidence ('100% sure', betting money), but then attempts to divert the vote toward James. This pattern suggests James is the Tanner and Mitchell is the Werewolf attempting to confuse the group while ensuring the Tanner is eliminated instead of himself.
